import hid
all_devs = hid.enumerate\(\)
logi = [d for d in all_devs if d['vendor_id'] == 0x046D]
print\(f'Total HID devices: {len\(all_devs\)}'\)
print\(f'Logitech devices: {len\(logi\)}'\)
for d in logi:
    print\(f\\"  {d.get\('product_string', '?'\)} PID=0x{d['product_id']:04X} page=0x{d.get\('usage_page',0\):04X}\\"\)
")
